display_text: Zeus Aghanim's Scepter: Nimbus — Creates a global presence threat that counters passive play and high-ground defense. The storm cloud automatically punishes grouped enemies or those hiding in fog, forcing repositioning and disrupting channeling abilities.
search_text: Zeus Aghanim Scepter Nimbus global presence anti-high-ground fog disruption channeling counter

display_text: Zeus Aghanim's Shard: Lightning Hands — Counters evasion and physical damage mitigation by converting Zeus' attacks into magical burst. This transforms Zeus into a hybrid right-clicker against low-magic-resistance targets while maintaining his spellcasting role.
search_text: Zeus Aghanim Shard Lightning Hands anti-evasion physical mitigation hybrid right-click magical burst
